{{Infobox character
| name = King of Damasca
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The first [[King of Damasca]] was a [[Traveler of Ragnarus]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] executed the [[King of Damasca]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Valin]] failed to kill the [[Damascan]] [[King]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Zakareth]] is the former [[King of Damasca]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
